    @JsonIgnore
    public void clone(Extensible to) {
        to.setExtSchema(this.getExtSchema());
        to.setExtAttrs(new HashMap<>(this.getExtAttrs()));

package com.jmix.executor.impl.southbridge;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.IModule;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.AlgCPFacadeAdapters;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.AlgCPModel;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ModuleAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ModuleBaseAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ParaVarImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.PartCategoryAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.PartVarImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.ModuleAlgBase;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.ModuleCPModel;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.cp.PartAlgCPLinearExpr;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.var.ParaVar;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.var.PartVar;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.view.ModuleInstView;

import java.lang.reflect.Field;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

public class SouthboundModuleAlgAdapter extends ModuleAlgImpl {
    private final ModuleAlgBase algorithm;
    private final Runtime runtime;

    public SouthboundModuleAlgAdapter(ModuleAlgBase algorithm) {
        this.algorithm = algorithm;
        this.runtime = new Runtime(this);
        this.algorithm.bindSouthboundRuntime(runtime);
    }

    public static void updateRuntimeContext(ModuleAlgBase algorithm, ModuleBaseAlgImpl context) {
        ModuleAlgBase.RuntimeSupport support = algorithm.southboundRuntime();
        if (support instanceof Runtime runtime) {
            runtime.setCurrentContext(context);
        }
    }

    public static Object newPartVarForField(ModuleAlgBase algorithm, PartVarImpl internalPartVar, Field field) {
        return runtime(algorithm).adapter.newPartVarForField(internalPartVar, field);
    }

    public static Object newParaVarForField(ModuleAlgBase algorithm, ParaVarImpl internalParaVar, Field field) {
        return runtime(algorithm).adapter.newParaVarForField(internalParaVar, field);
    }

    private static Runtime runtime(ModuleAlgBase algorithm) {
        ModuleAlgBase.RuntimeSupport support = algorithm.southboundRuntime();
        if (support instanceof Runtime runtime) {
            return runtime;
        }
        throw new IllegalStateException("Southbound runtime is not bound: " + algorithm.getClass().getName());
    }

    @Override
    protected Object moduleAlgFile() {
        return algorithm;
    }

    @Override
    protected void initModelAfter(AlgCPModel model) {
        runtime.bindModel();
    }

    @Override
    protected void afterInitData(IModule module, Object moduleAlg) {
        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = getPartCategoryAlgs();
        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (Field field : algorithm.getClass().getDeclaredFields()) {
            field.setAccessible(true);
            fieldMap.put(extractCodeFromFieldName(field.getName()), field);
        }
        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgImpls) {
            Field field = fieldMap.get(partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode());
            if (field != null
                    && com.jmix.executor.southinf.var.PartCategoryVar.class.isAssignableFrom(field.getType())) {
                setVariableField(algorithm, SouthboundVarHandles.partCategory(partCategoryAlgImpl), field);
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected Object newPartVar(PartVarImpl internalPartVar) {
        return SouthboundVarHandles.part(internalPartVar);
    }

    @Override
    protected Object newParaVar(ParaVarImpl internalParaVar) {
        return SouthboundVarHandles.para(internalParaVar);
    }

    @Override
    protected Object newPartVarForField(PartVarImpl internalPartVar, Field field) {
        if (PartVarImpl.class.isAssignableFrom(field.getType())) {
            return internalPartVar;
        }
        return newPartVar(internalPartVar);
    }

    @Override
    protected Object newParaVarForField(ParaVarImpl internalParaVar, Field field) {
        if (ParaVarImpl.class.isAssignableFrom(field.getType())) {
            return internalParaVar;
        }
        return newParaVar(internalParaVar);
    }

    private String extractCodeFromFieldName(String fieldName) {
        if (fieldName.endsWith("Var")) {
            return fieldName.substring(0, fieldName.length() - 3);
        }
        return fieldName;
    }

    public static final class Runtime implements ModuleAlgBase.RuntimeSupport {
        private final SouthboundModuleAlgAdapter adapter;
        private ModuleCPModel model;

        private Runtime(SouthboundModuleAlgAdapter adapter) {
            this.adapter = adapter;
        }

        private void bindModel() {
            this.model = new SouthboundLatestBridge(adapter).mode

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

/**
 * йғЁд»¶е®ҡд№ү
 * иЎЁзӨәжЁЎеқ—дёӯзҡ„йғЁд»¶пјҢж”ҜжҢҒеҺҹеӯҗйғЁд»¶е’ҢеӨҚеҗҲйғЁд»¶
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class Part extends Onto implements IPart {
    /**
     * йғЁд»¶жңҖеӨ§ж•°йҮҸйҷҗеҲ¶
     */
    public static final int MAX_QUANTITY = 20;

    /**
     * йғЁд»¶жңҖе°Ҹж•°йҮҸйҷҗеҲ¶
     */
    public static final int MIN_QUANTITY = 0;

    /**
     * йғЁд»¶зҹӯзј–з ҒеүҚзјҖ
     */
    public static final String SHORT_CODE_PREFIX = "PT";

    /**
     * йғЁд»¶зұ»еһӢ
     */
    private PartType partType = PartType.ATOMIC;

    /**
     * еҺҹеӯҗPartзҡ„зӣ®еҪ•д»·
     */
    private Long price = 0L;

    /**
     * еҺҹеӯҗPartзҡ„жңҖеӨ§ж•°йҮҸ
     */
    private Integer maxQuantity = MAX_QUANTITY;

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–й»ҳи®Өж•°йҮҸ
     * 
     * @return й»ҳи®Өж•°йҮҸ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Integer getDefaultQuantity() {
        return super.getDefaultValue();
    }

    /**
     * е…ӢйҡҶPartеҜ№иұЎ
     *
     * @return е…ӢйҡҶзҡ„PartеҜ№иұЎ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Part clone() {
        Part to = new Part();
        super.clone(to);
        // еӨҚеҲ¶Partзү№жңүеұһжҖ§
        to.setPartType(this.getPartType());
        to.setPrice(this.getPrice());
        to.setMaxQuantity(this.getMaxQuantity());
        return to;
    }

}
```

**Add: `src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/bmodel/logic/PartCombination.java`**

```diff
+package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;
+
+import lombok.Data;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеұ•ејҖеҗҺзҡ„йғЁд»¶зј–з Ғз»„еҗҲгҖӮ
+ *
+ * @since 2026-05-19
+ */
+@Data
+public class PartCombination {
+    private String code1;
+
+    private String code2;
+
+    private String code3;
+
+    private String sourceSubRuleCode;
+
+    public PartCombination() {
+    }
+
+    public PartCombination(String code1, String code2, String sourceSubRuleCode) {
+        this.code1 = code1;
+        this.code2 = code2;
+        this.sourceSubRuleCode = sourceSubRuleCode;
+    }
+
+    public PartCombination(String code1, String code2, String code3, String sourceSubRuleCode) {
+        this.code1 = code1;
+        this.code2 = code2;
+        this.code3 = code3;
+        this.sourceSubRuleCode = sourceSubRuleCode;
+    }
+
+    public List<String> getCodes(int arity) {
+        List<String> codes = new ArrayList<>();
+        if (arity >= 1) {
+            codes.add(code1);
+        }
+        if (arity >= 2) {
+            codes.add(code2);
+        }
+        if (arity >= 3) {
+            codes.add(code3);
+        }
+        if (arity < 1 || arity > 3) {
+            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported arity: " + arity);
+        }
+        return codes;
+    }
+}
```

+package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;
+
+import lombok.Data;
+import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * йқўеҗ‘з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–еҜ№иұЎеұһжҖ§иЎЁиҫҫејҸгҖӮ
+ *
+ * @since 2026-05-19
+ */
+@Data
+@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
+public class StructExprSchema extends ExprSchema {
+    private String objectType = RefProgObjSchema.PROG_OBJ_TYPE_PARTCATEGORY;
+
+    private String objectCode;
+
+    private String attrCode;
+
+    private StructCompareOperator operator;
+
+    private List<String> values = new ArrayList<>();
+

+        List<RefProgObjSchema> refs = new ArrayList<>();

+            refs.add(new RefProgObjSchema(objectType, objectCode, attrCode));

+package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;
+
+import lombok.Data;
+import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * дәҢе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷ SchemaгҖӮ
+ *
+ * @since 2026-05-19
+ */
+@Data
+@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
+public class PairStructRuleSchema extends RuleSchema {
+    private StructExprSchema expr1;
+
+    private BusinessRelationType relationType;
+
+    private StructExprSchema expr2;
+
+    @Override
+    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getFromLeftProgObjs() {
+        return expr1 == null ? new ArrayList<>() : expr1.getRefProgObjs();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getToRightProgObjs() {
+        return expr2 == null ? new ArrayList<>() : expr2.getRefProgObjs();
+    }
+}
```

+package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;
+
+import lombok.Data;
+import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.List;
+
+/**
+ * з»„еҗҲз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷзҲ¶ SchemaгҖӮ
+ *
+ * @since 2026-05-19
+ */
+@Data
+@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
+public class CombinationStructRuleSchema extends RuleSchema {
+    private int arity;
+
+    private List<String> dimensionCategoryCodes = new ArrayList<>();
+
+    private PartCombinationType type;
+
+    private List<String> subRuleCodes = new ArrayList<>();
+
+    @Override
+    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getFromLeftProgObjs() {
+        return dimensionRefs();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getToRightProgObjs() {
+        return dimensionRefs();
+    }
+
+    private List<RefProgObjSchema> dimensionRefs() {
+        List<RefProgObjSchema> refs = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (String categoryCode : dimensionCategoryCodes) {
+            refs.add(new RefProgObjSchema(RefProgObjSchema.PROG_OBJ_TYPE_PARTCATEGORY, categoryCode, null));
+        }
+        return refs;
+    }
+}

# RFC жӨ№еҚһе§©еҜ®вӮ¬йҚҷжҲқдјҗжөЈж»„зҘҰ

## е§’еӮқе Ә

иӨ°ж’¶ж•ӨйҺҙз–ҜоӣҰе§№еӮӣзүҙйҺ№?RFC йҸӮеӣЁгҖӮжқ©ж¶ңо”‘еҜ®вӮ¬йҚҷжҲһжӨӮй”ӣеұҫеўҪзҗӣеұјдә’ж¶“е¬«зҲЈйҚ‘е——еҜІе®ёгғӨз¶”еЁҙдҪөвӮ¬?

## е®ёгғӨз¶”еЁҙдҪәв–ј

### й—ғиҲөоҶҢ 1й”ӣж°ұжӮҠз‘ҷпҪүжё¶е§№?

1. з’ҮиҜІеҪҮ RFC йҸӮеӣЁгҖӮй”ӣе қоӣ§ `doc/RFC-XXXX-*.md`й”ӣ?
2. з’ҮиҜІеҪҮ `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md` жөңе—ҡР’жҘ еұҫж•№йҸҚеӣ§еҷҜ
3. йҚ’е—ҳзҖҪз’ҒжҚҗо…ёз‘•дҪ№зң°й”ӣеІҖвҖҳзҖ№ж°¶жё¶з‘•дҪ·ж…ЁйҸҖеңӯж®‘йҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҚңеұје”¬йҗ®?

### й—ғиҲөоҶҢ 2й”ӣж°«е”¬йҗ®дҪёзҙ‘йҚҷ?

1. йҸҚи§„еөҒ RFC з’ҒжҚҗо…ёзҖ№зӮөе№Үжө пҪҮзҲң
2. й–¬йқӣжғҠжӨӨеңӯжҙ°жө пҪҮзҲңз‘ҷеӢ®еҜ–й”ӣе қеј¬з‘ҷ?`CLAUDE.md`й”ӣ?

### й—ғиҲөоҶҢ 3й”ӣж°ӯзҘҙз’ҮжӣўзҚҷз’Ү?

1. зјӮж §е•“еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗўг„Өз·Ҙй”ӣе қеј¬й‘°?`src/test/java/com/jmix/scenario/`й”ӣ?
2. жөЈи·Ёж•ӨеЁүг„ЁР’жӨ№еҚһе§©йҸӮз‘°зҙЎзҖ№ж°«з®ҹеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜеҰҜвҖіжҪЎй”ӣ?

4. зәӯоҶ»з№ҡйҗңзүҲж№ҒеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜж¶”зҶ»е…ҳй–«ж°із№ғй”ӣ?

### й—ғиҲөоҶҢ 4й”ӣж°іеҡңйҚ”г„ҰеҪҒжөң?

иӨ°ж’ҙзҘҙз’ҮжӣһеҸҸй–®г„©вӮ¬ж°із№ғйҚҡеәҜзҙ°

1. **йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҸӮжқҝеһҺйҸҖ?*й”ӣ?

## йҚҸжҠҪж•ӯз»ҫпёҪжҪ«

- **йҸғгғҘз№”з’Үо…Ўв–Ҳ**й”ӣж°ӯеўҚйҸҲ?log.info() и№Үе‘ҙгҖҸжөЈи·Ёж•Өй‘»иҫЁжһғ

- **йҚҡжҲқжӮ—йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗ**й”ӣж°ұвҖҳж·ҮжҝҲе№ҮйҸҲеӨӢзҘҙз’Үжӣҡз¬үйҚҷжҘҖеҘ–йҚқ?

## з”ҜжӯҢоқҶ RFC йҸӮеӣҰж¬ўжөЈе¶Үз–Ҷ

- з’ҒжҚҗо…ёйҸӮеӣЁгҖӮй”ӣжӯҡdoc/RFC-*.md`

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonSubTypes;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonTypeInfo;

import lombok.Data;

import java.util.List;

/**
 * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaйҚ©иҷ№иў«
 * зҖ№ж°«з®ҹз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҗЁеӢ«зҶҖйҸҲо„ӮзІЁйҸӢеӢ«жӢ°зҗӣеұјиҙҹ
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@JsonTypeInfo(use = JsonTypeInfo.Id.NAME, include = JsonTypeInfo.As.PROPERTY, property = "@type")
@JsonSubTypes({
        @JsonSubTypes.Type(value = CompatiableRuleSchema.class, name = "CompatiableRule"),
        @JsonSubTypes.Type(value = CalculateRuleSchema.class, name = "CalculateRule"),
        @JsonSubTypes.Type(value = SelectRuleSchema.class, name = "SelectRule"),
        @JsonSubTypes.Type(value = CodeRuleSchema.class, name = "CodeRule"),
        @JsonSubTypes.Type(value = PriorityRuleSchema.class, name = "PriorityRule")
})
public abstract class RuleSchema {
    /**
     * Schemaз»«иҜІзҖ·
     * йҸҖоҲӣеҜ”йҗЁеӢӯиў«йҚЁе¬ӘеҜҳйҺ·о„Ҡзҙ°
     * - CompatiableRule: йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҺ¬СҶоқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙқйҗўг„Өз°¬зҖ№ж°«з®ҹйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺҙж ӯе„ҙжө жңөз®Јй—ӮеҜёж®‘йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҚҸеҙҮйғҙ
     * * Incompatible: ж¶“е¶…еҗӢзҖ№еңӯе®ійҸүзҮӮзҙқзҗӣг„§гҒҡж¶“гӮ„йҮңй–«еӨҗгҖҚж¶“е¶Ҳе…ҳйҚҡеұҫжӨӮй–«еӨӢе«Ё
     * * CoDependent: йҚҸеҚһз“ЁйҺ¬С…е®ійҸүзҮӮзҙқзҗӣг„§гҒҡж¶“гӮ„йҮңй–«еӨҗгҖҚи№Үе‘ҙгҖҸйҚҡеұҫжӨӮй–«еӨӢе«ЁйҺҙж §жӮ“йҸғжңөз¬үй–«еӨӢе«Ё
     * * Requires: жёҡжҝҠзҰҶз»ҫпёҪжҪ«й”ӣеІғгҖғз»ҖжҙӘвӮ¬еӨӢе«ЁйҸҢж„ӘйҮңй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҸғи·әз№ҖжӨӨе©ҡвӮ¬еӨӢе«ЁйҚҷпёҝз«ҙж¶“оҒҲвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚ
     * - SelectRule: й–«еӨӢе«Ёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәЎз•ҫж¶”еӨҠеј¬йҸҒзүҲеһЁй–®г„Өж¬ўйҗЁеӢҜвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёз»ҫпёҪжҪ«
     * * single: йҚ—жӣўвӮ¬еӨҢе®ійҸүзҮӮзҙқи№Үе‘ҙгҖҸж¶“ж–ҝеҪ§й‘ід»ӢвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҲвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚ
     * * multiple: жҫ¶ж°¶вӮ¬еӨҢе®ійҸүзҮӮзҙқйҚҷоҲҷдә’й–«еӨӢе«Ёжҫ¶ж°«йҮңй–«еӨҗгҖҚ
     * - CalculateRule: з’Ғпј„з•»з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәЎз•ҫж¶”еӨӢжҡҹй–ІеҝӢвӮ¬дҪ·зҺҜйҸҚиӮ©з“‘з’Ғпј„з•»йҚҸеҙҮйғҙ
     * - CodeRule: жө пҪҮзҲңз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәӨгҖғз»Җзғҳз—…йҸҲеӨҢзІЁйҸӢеӢ«еҜІйҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙқжө пҪҮзҲңйҸ„з–Ңodeй”ӣе Ҙжё¶з‘•дҪ№еўңе®ёгғЁжөҶйҚ–ж Ұиҙҹз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣ?
     * жқ©ж¬Һз°әз»«иҜІзҖ·зҖөз‘°з°Іж¶“е¶…жӮ“йҗЁеӢӘз¬ҹйҚ”вҖіжәҖйҸ…оҲӨзҙқе§Јеҝ•оқ’з»«иҜІзҖ·й–®иҠҘж№ҒйҚҸеүҒеЈ’зҖ№ж°ұж®‘SchemaзјҒж’ҙзҖҜйҚңеұҪоҳ©йҗһе—ӣвӮ¬жҳҸз·«
     */
    private String type;

    /**
     * Schemaйҗ—е ҹж№°
     */
    private String version;

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜе®ёпёҝжҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     * 
     * @return е®ёпёҝжҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public abstract List<RefProgObjSchema> getFromLeftProgObjs();

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҷе……жҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     * 
     * @return йҚҷе……жҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public abstract List<RefProgObjSchema> getToRightProgObjs();
}

# RFC-0007: з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷдёҺз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ Schema

> зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡиҚүжЎҲпјҲDraftпјү
> ж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2026-05-19
> зӣёе…іж–ҮжЎЈпјҡ`doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`, `doc/RFC-0005-0.1-North-South-Interface-Decoupling-Patch.md`, `doc/RFC-0006-North-Interface-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0008-Rule-Model-IR-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0009-Optional-PartCategory-Whitelist-Guard.md`

---

## и®ҫи®ЎеҶізӯ–ж‘ҳиҰҒ

жң¬ RFC и®Ёи®әи§„еҲҷз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе’Ңи®Ўз®—еј•ж“Һд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷиЎЁиҫҫгҖӮзӣ®ж ҮжҳҜи®©дёҡеҠЎдәәе‘ҳеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јжҲ–жӢ–жӢҪжҺ§д»¶з»ҙжҠӨи§„еҲҷпјҢеҗҢж—¶и®Ўз®—еј•ж“Һд»Қз„¶жҠҠи§„еҲҷзј–иҜ‘дёә CP-SAT зәҰжқҹгҖӮ

| дё»йўҳ | еҶізӯ– |
| --- | --- |
| з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒиЎЁиҫҫ | ж–°еўһ `PairStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`TripleStructRuleSchema` е’Ң `CombinationStructRuleSchema` |
| иЎЁиҫҫејҸзІ’еәҰ | дҪҝз”Ё `StructExprSchema` иЎЁзӨәвҖңеҜ№иұЎ + еұһжҖ§ + жҜ”иҫғз¬Ұ + еҖјвҖқ |
| зҲ¶еӯҗи§„еҲҷе…ізі» | жң¬ RFC д»Қе»әи®®ж–°еўһ `Rule.parentRuleCode`пјӣдёҚеӨҚз”ЁзҺ°жңү `Rule.fatherCode`пјҢеӣ дёәеҪ“еүҚд»Јз Ғдёӯ `fatherCode` е·ІиЎЁзӨәи§„еҲҷжҢӮиҪҪзҡ„ PartCategory |
| е…ізі»зұ»еһӢ | д»…дҝқз•ҷ `INCOMPATIBLE`гҖҒ`REQUIRES`гҖҒ`CO_DEPENDENT`пјӣ`CO_DEPENDENT` еҗҢж—¶иЎЁзӨәе…је®№/й…ҚеҘ—е…ізі» |
| иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒиЎЁиҫҫ | жң¬ RFC е»әи®®еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺз”ҹжҲҗ `Rule.exeSchema = CodependantRuleSchema`пјӣеҪ“еүҚ `Rule` зұ»е°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ« `parentRuleCode` / `exeSchema` |
| еҚ—еҗ‘жҺҘеҸЈиҫ№з•Ң | з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷжү§иЎҢеҷЁеұһдәҺеј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁиғҪеҠӣпјӣиӢҘзӨәдҫӢи§Ұиҫҫ CP е»әжЁЎпјҢеә”дҪҝз”Ё `ModuleCPModel`гҖҒ`AlgCPBoolVar`гҖҒ`AlgCPLiteral`гҖҒ`PartVar` зӯү facadeпјҢдёҚеҶҚеңЁдә§е“Ғз®—жі•/RFC зӨәдҫӢдёӯжҡҙйңІ OR-Tools `BoolVar` / `Literal` |
| зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ | йҖүдёӯзҡ„йғЁд»¶з»„еҗҲеҝ…йЎ»е‘ҪдёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖжқЎе…Ғи®ёз»„еҗҲ |
| й»‘еҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ | жҜҸжқЎзҰҒжӯўз»„еҗҲз”ҹжҲҗвҖңдёҚиғҪеҗҢж—¶йҖүдёӯвҖқзҡ„зәҰжқҹ |
| йҖ»иҫ‘е®ҢеӨҮжҖ§ | и®Ўз®—еј•ж“ҺеҸӘжү§иЎҢзЎ®е®ҡиҜӯд№үпјӣз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе®ҢеӨҮжҖ§зӯ–з•ҘдёҚеңЁжң¬ RFC е»әжЁЎ |
| ж ЎйӘҢжҺҘеҸЈ | и§„еҲ’еңЁ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` ж–°еўһ `validate(ModuleValidateReq)`пјӣеҪ“еүҚжҺҘеҸЈд»ҚеҸӘжңү `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/postCalculate` |
| дәҢе…ғ/дёүе…ғж”ҜжҢҒ | йҰ–жңҹж”ҜжҢҒдәҢе…ғе’Ңдёүе…ғпјӣжӣҙй«ҳе…ғеҸҜз”ұеҗҺз»ӯйҖҡз”Ё `NaryStructRuleSchema` жү©еұ• |

---

## 1. ж‘ҳиҰҒ

еҪ“еүҚи§„еҲҷжӣҙеҒҸеҗ‘д»Јз ҒејҸжҲ–е·Іжңүе…је®№и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢйҡҫд»Ҙж”Ҝж’‘е®ўжҲ·йҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јеҢ–з•Ңйқўз»ҙжҠӨвҖңCPU ж ёж•° = 4 дёҚе…је®№зЎ¬зӣҳйҖҹзҺҮ = 5400вҖқиҝҷзұ»з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷгҖӮжң¬ RFC жҸҗи®®еңЁ `Rule.rawCode` дёӯж–°еўһдәҢе…ғгҖҒдёүе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢе№¶еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺеұ•ејҖдёә `CodependantRuleSchema`пјҢдҪҝз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒеҸҜиҜ»гҖҒиҝҗиЎҢжҖҒеҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖӮ

жң¬ж–Үе·ІжҢү `RFC-0005-0.1` еҗҺзҡ„еҚ—еҗ‘жҺҘеҸЈйҮҚжһ„еҲ·ж–°пјҡдә§е“Ғз®—жі•дҫ§е…ҘеҸЈжҳҜ `ModuleAlgBase.model()`пјҢCP иғҪеҠӣйҖҡиҝҮ `ModuleCPModel` / `AlgCP*` facade жҡҙйңІпјҢ`southinf` дёҚдҫқиө– `impl` еҢ…е’Ң OR-ToolsгҖӮз»“жһ„еҢ–з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷжң¬иә«д»ҚжҳҜеј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁеҫ…е®һзҺ°иғҪеҠӣпјҢдҪҶйӘҢж”¶зӨәдҫӢе’Ңжү§иЎҢдјӘд»Јз ҒдёҚеҶҚдҪҝз”Ёж—§зҡ„ `ConstraintAlgBase` жҲ–зӣҙжҺҘ OR-Tools зұ»еһӢгҖӮ

---

## 2. еҠЁжңә

### 2.1 й—®йўҳиғҢжҷҜ

е®ўжҲ·зҡ„ејҖеҸ‘дәәе‘ҳеёҢжңӣз”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁж јз»ҙжҠӨи§„еҲҷпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘзј–еҶҷ Java д»Јз ҒжҲ–иҮӘз”ұиЎЁиҫҫејҸгҖӮе…ёеһӢз•ҢйқўдәӨдә’еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

1. йҖүжӢ©е·ҰиЎЁиҫҫејҸпјҡеҜ№иұЎ `cpu`пјҢеұһжҖ§ `CoreNum`пјҢж“ҚдҪңз¬Ұ `=`пјҢеҖј `4`гҖӮ
2. йҖүжӢ©дёҡеҠЎе…ізі»пјҡдҫӢеҰӮвҖңдёҚе…је®№вҖқгҖӮ
3. йҖүжӢ©еҸіиЎЁиҫҫејҸпјҡеҜ№иұЎ `drive`пјҢеұһжҖ§ `Speed`пјҢж“ҚдҪңз¬Ұ `=`пјҢеҖј `5400`гҖӮ

иҝҷзұ»и§„еҲҷжң¬иҙЁдёҠжҳҜдёҖдёӘдәҢе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫпјҡ

```text
cpu.CoreNum = 4  INCOMPATIBLE  drive.Speed = 5400
```

еҪ“еүҚзі»з»ҹдёӯ `Rule.rawCode` е·Із»Ҹж”ҜжҢҒ `CompatiableRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CodeRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CalculateRuleSchema` зӯүзұ»еһӢпјҢдҪҶзјәе°‘йқўеҗ‘ UI иЎЁж јз»ҙжҠӨзҡ„йҖҡз”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫжЁЎеһӢгҖӮ

### 2.2 з®ҖеҚ•з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеңәжҷҜ

дёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷпјҡ

```text
4 ж ё CPU дёҚе…је®№ 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳ
```

з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒжңҹжңӣпјҡ

```json
{
  "@type": "PairStructRule",
  "expr1": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "cpu",
    "attrCode": "CoreNum",
    "operator": "EQ",
    "values": ["4"]
  },
  "relationType": "INCOMPATIBLE",
  "expr2": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "drive",
    "attrCode": "Speed",
    "operator": "EQ",
    "values": ["5400"]
  }
}
```

иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒжңҹжңӣпјҡ

- иҝҮж»ӨеҮәжүҖжңү `CoreNum = 4` зҡ„ CPU йғЁд»¶гҖӮ
- иҝҮж»ӨеҮәжүҖжңү `Speed = 5400` зҡ„зЎ¬зӣҳйғЁд»¶гҖӮ
- еҜ№иҝҮж»Өз»“жһңдёӯзҡ„жҜҸдёӘдәҢе…ғз»„еҗҲз”ҹжҲҗдёҚе…је®№зәҰжқҹгҖӮ

### 2.3 з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷеңәжҷҜ

дёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷдёҚжҖ»жҳҜеҚ•жқЎдәҢе…ғе…ізі»пјҢиҖҢеҸҜиғҪжҳҜдёҖз»„еҝ…йЎ»ж•ҙдҪ“з»ҙжҠӨзҡ„еӯҗи§„еҲҷгҖӮдҫӢеҰӮ CPU дёҺзЎ¬зӣҳзҡ„й…ҚеҘ—зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•пјҡ

1. 4 ж ё CPU й…ҚеҘ— 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳгҖӮ
2. 8 ж ё CPU й…ҚеҘ— 7200 иҪ¬жҲ– 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳгҖӮ
3. 8 ж ёд»ҘдёҠ CPU еҝ…йЎ»й…ҚеҘ— 7200 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳгҖӮ

иҝҷдёүжқЎеӯҗи§„еҲҷеұһдәҺеҗҢдёҖдёӘзҲ¶и§„еҲҷгҖӮж ЎйӘҢж—¶пјҢеҰӮжһңз”ЁжҲ·йҖүжӢ©дәҶ `cpu1(CoreNum=4)` е’Ң `driv
... (truncated)
```

# JMix Config Engine - йӘҢж”¶еҮҶеҲҷ

> зүҲжң¬пјҡv0.2
> з”ҹжҲҗж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2026-04-24
> зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡжӯЈејҸзүҲ

---

## з¬¬дёҖйғЁеҲҶпјҡйӘҢж”¶еҮҶеҲҷпјҲи§„еҲҷ/еҺҹеҲҷпјү

### 1.1 ж ёеҝғеҺҹеҲҷ

#### 1.1.1 жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢи®ҫи®ЎеҺҹеҲҷ

| еҺҹеҲҷ | иҜҙжҳҺ | е…·дҪ“иҰҒжұӮ |
|------|------|----------|
| **йҖ»иҫ‘е®ҢеӨҮ** | жҜҸдёӘеҠҹиғҪзҡ„жөӢиҜ•зӮ№иҰҒе…ЁйқўиҰҶзӣ– | жӯЈеёёи·Ҝеҫ„ + иҫ№з•ҢжқЎд»¶ + ејӮеёёи·Ҝеҫ„ |
| **з”ЁдҫӢзӢ¬з«Ӣ** | йҒҝе…Қз”ЁдҫӢд№Ӣй—ҙйҮҚеҸ  | дёҖдёӘз”ЁдҫӢеҸӘжөӢдёҖдёӘеҠҹиғҪзӮ№ |
| **ж•°жҚ®жһҒз®Җ** | еҸӘдҝқз•ҷеҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪе…іжіЁзҡ„ж•°жҚ® | ж— е…ізҡ„еҸӮж•°/йғЁд»¶/и§„еҲҷдёҖеҫӢзңҒз•Ҙ |

#### 1.1.2 ејҖеҸ‘жөҒзЁӢеҺҹеҲҷ

| еҺҹеҲҷ | иҜҙжҳҺ | е…·дҪ“иҰҒжұӮ |
|------|------|----------|
| **еӨҚз”ЁеҸӮиҖғ** | ж–°еўһз”ЁдҫӢж—¶еӨҚеҲ¶еҸӮиҖғжөӢиҜ•иҖҢйқһд»ҺеӨҙеҲӣе»ә | еӨҚеҲ¶ вҶ’ дҝ®ж”№ вҶ’ йӘҢиҜҒ |
| **еӨ§жЁЎеһӢйӘҢиҜҒ** | еӨҚжқӮйҖ»иҫ‘йңҖз”ЁеӨ§жЁЎеһӢдәӨеҸүйӘҢиҜҒ | иҮӘеҠЁз”ҹжҲҗ Prompt вҶ’ LLM йӘҢиҜҒ |
| **иҮӘеҠЁеҢ–еӣһеҪ’** | йӘҢиҜҒйҖҡиҝҮзҡ„з”ЁдҫӢйңҖзәіе…ҘеӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•йӣҶ | `mvn test` еҸҜиҮӘеҠЁжү§иЎҢ |

#### 1.1.3 и®ҫи®ЎзӨәдҫӢ

**вқҢ й”ҷиҜҜзӨәдҫӢ**пјҡдёҖдёӘз”ЁдҫӢжөӢеӨҡдёӘеҠҹиғҪпјҢж•°жҚ®еҶ—дҪҷ

```java
// й”ҷиҜҜпјҡдёҖдёӘз”ЁдҫӢжөӢдәҶ3дёӘеҠҹиғҪпјҢж•°жҚ®еӨҚжқӮ
@PartAnno(code = "cpu")    // дёҚзӣёе…і
@PartAnno(code = "gpu")    // дёҚзӣёе…і
@PartAnno(code = "memory")  // дёҚзӣёе…і
@ParaAnno  // дёҚзӣёе…і
private PartVar storage;   // дёҚзӣёе…і

@Test
public void testRequiresAndIncompatibleAndPriority() {
    // еҗҢж—¶жөӢиҜ•3з§Қи§„еҲҷ...
}
```

**вң… жӯЈзЎ®зӨәдҫӢ**пјҡдёҖдёӘз”ЁдҫӢеҸӘжөӢдёҖдёӘеҠҹиғҪпјҢж•°жҚ®жһҒз®Җ

```java
// вң… жӯЈзЎ®пјҡеҸӘжөӢиҜ• Requires зәҰжқҹпјҢж•°жҚ®жһҒз®Җ
@ParaAnno(options = {"i9", "i7", "i5"})
private ParaVar cpuVar;

@ParaAnno(options = {"air", "liquid"})
private ParaVar coolerVar;

@Test
public void testRequires_cpu_i9_needs_liquid() {
    // еҸӘжөӢиҜ• Requires и§„еҲҷ
}

@Test
public void testRequires_cpu_i7_no_restriction() {

### 1.2 жөӢиҜ•еҲҶзұ»

| жөӢиҜ•зұ»еһӢ | жҸҸиҝ° | еҸӮиҖғзӨәдҫӢ | еӯҳж”ҫдҪҚзҪ® |
|----------|------|----------|----------|
| **еңәжҷҜжөӢиҜ•** | еӨҚжқӮз»“жһ„жҖ§жөӢиҜ•пјҢеёҰе®Ңж•ҙдёҡеҠЎж•°жҚ® | `BaseOptiTest` | `opti/base/` |
| **йҖ»иҫ‘жөӢиҜ•** | зәҜзІ№жөӢиҜ•жҹҗдёӘзәҰжқҹ/и§„еҲҷйҖ»иҫ‘ | `CalculateRuleIfThenTest` | `scenario/ruletest/` |
| **APIжөӢиҜ•** | жөӢиҜ•еә•еұӮ API еҠҹиғҪжӯЈзЎ®жҖ§ | `FilterExpressionExecutorTest` | `tool/` |

---

## з¬¬дәҢйғЁеҲҶпјҡжөӢиҜ•ж•°жҚ®жһ„е»әи§„иҢғ

### 2.1 ж•°жҚ®жһ„е»әж ёеҝғеҺҹеҲҷ

> **жһҒз®ҖеҺҹеҲҷ**пјҡеҰӮжһңдёҚжҳҜеҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪе…іжіЁзҡ„пјҢе°ұдёҚиҰҒжһ„е»әгҖӮ

| жһ„е»әйЎ№ | е…іжіЁзӮ№ | йқһе…іжіЁзӮ№пјҲдёҚиҰҒжһ„е»әпјү |
|--------|--------|---------------------|
| PartCategory | еҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪж¶үеҸҠзҡ„еҲҶзұ» | е…¶д»–ж— е…іеҲҶзұ» |
| Part | еҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪж¶үеҸҠзҡ„йғЁд»¶ | е…¶д»–йғЁд»¶ |
| Para | еҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪж¶үеҸҠзҡ„еҸӮж•° | е…¶д»–еҸӮж•° |
| Rule | еҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪж¶үеҸҠзҡ„и§„еҲҷ | е…¶д»–и§„еҲҷ |
| еұһжҖ§йҖүйЎ№ | еҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪйңҖиҰҒзҡ„йҖүйЎ№ | е…¶д»–йҖүйЎ№ |

### 2.2 жіЁи§ЈдҪҝз”Ёи§„иҢғ

еҸӮиҖғ `BaseOptiTest.java` дёӯзҡ„жіЁи§Је®ҡд№үжЁЎејҸпјҡ

```java
// ---------------жЁЎеһӢе®ҡд№үз»“жһ„----------------------------------------
// 1. е®ҡд№үжЁЎеқ—
@ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
static public class MyConstraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {

    // 2. е®ҡд№үйғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»пјҲзҲ¶еұӮпјү
    @PartAnno(code = "drive")
    @DAttrAnno2(code = "Speed", options = {"Speed_5400:5400:иҪ¬", ...})
    @DAttrAnno3(code = "Capacity", options = {"Capacity_1T:1:T", ...})
    private PartCategoryVar drive;

    // 3. е®ҡд№үйғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»пјҲеӯҗеұӮпјҢз»§жүҝзҲ¶еұӮеұһжҖ§пјү
    @PartAnno(code = "sd", fatherCode = "drive")
    @DAttrInherit(fatherCode = "driveVar")
    private PartCategoryVar sd;

    // 4. е®ҡд№үе…·дҪ“йғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢ
    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "sd", attrs = {"5400", "1"})
    private PartVar sd1;

    // 5. е®ҡд№үеҸӮж•°
    @ParaAnno(fatherCode = "drive", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
    private ParaVar Sum_Capacity;

    // 6. е®ҡд№үи§„еҲҷ
    @CodeRuleAnno(fatherCode = "drive", normalNaturalCode = "дёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷжҸҸиҝ°")
    private void rule1() {
        // зәҰжқҹе®һзҺ°
    }

    @PriorityRuleAnno(strategy = PriorityStrategy.MIN)
    private void rule2() {
        // дјҳеҢ–и§„еҲҷе®һзҺ°
    }
}
```

### 2.2 ж•°жҚ®еұӮзә§з»“жһ„

```
Module (жЁЎеқ—)
  в””в”Җв”Җ PartCategory (йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»)
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ PartCategory (еӯҗеҲҶзұ»пјҢз»§жүҝзҲ¶еҲҶзұ»еұһжҖ§)
        в”Ӯ     в””в”Җв”Җ Part (е…·дҪ“йғЁд»¶)
        в””в”Җв”Җ Part (е…·дҪ“йғЁд»¶)
```

### 2.3 ж–°еўһжөӢиҜ•ж•°жҚ®жӯҘйӘӨ

1. **еӨҚеҲ¶еҸӮиҖғж–Үд»¶**пјҡд»Һ `scenario/ruletest/` жҲ– `opti/base/` еӨҚеҲ¶еҸӮиҖғжөӢиҜ•
2. **дҝ®ж”№зұ»еҗҚ**пјҡдҪҝз”Ё `XxxNewFeatureTest` е‘ҪеҗҚ
3. **е®ҡд№үж–°зҡ„зәҰжқҹзұ»**пјҡдҪҝз”Ё `XxxNewFeatureConstraint` е‘ҪеҗҚ
4. **з®ҖеҢ–ж•°жҚ®**пјҡеҸӘеҢ…еҗ«еҪ“еүҚеҠҹиғҪйңҖиҰҒзҡ„жңҖе°Ҹж•°жҚ®йӣҶ
5. **зј–еҶҷжөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ**пјҡжҜҸдёӘжөӢиҜ
... (truncated)
```

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.Extensible;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonSubTypes;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonTypeInfo;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜзҖ№ж°«з®ҹ
 * зҗӣг„§гҒҡеҰҜвҖіжҪЎж¶“о… ж®‘з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеұҫж•®йҺёдҪёоҳҝз»үе¶ҲоқүйҚ’ж¬‘иў«йҚЁ?
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
@JsonTypeInfo(use = JsonTypeInfo.Id.NAME, include = JsonTypeInfo.As.PROPERTY, property = "@type")
@JsonSubTypes({
        @JsonSubTypes.Type(value = Rule.class, name = "Rule")
})
public class Rule extends Extensible {
    /**
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜзјӮж «зҲң
     */
    private String code;

    /**
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */
    private String name;

    /**
     * йҚҷоҲңзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һпј„иў«йҚЁ?
     */
    private String progObjType;

    /**
     * йҚҷоҲңзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һпј„зҙӘйҗ®?
     */
    private String progObjCode;

    /**
     * йҚҷоҲңзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖізқҳйҺ¬?
     */
    private String progObjField;

    /**
     * з‘ҷеӢ®еҜ–йҚ–ж ¬еҡңйҗ’жғ°оҮўз‘·вӮ¬зҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     */
    private String normalNaturalCode;

    /**
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҳзҶ·оқҗжө пҪҮзҲң
     */
    private RuleSchema rawCode;

    /**
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘй‘јеҶЁзҙЎз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     * жёҡе¬Әоӣ§й”ӣж¬іDSL.V5.Struct.CompatiableRule
     */
    private String ruleSchemaTypeFullName;

    /**
     * йҗ–е •е„ҙжө еүҒзҙӘйҗ®?
     * жҝЎеӮӣзҒүж¶“иҷ№в”–зҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“иҜ§зҙқйҚ’ж¬’оқүйҚ’ж¬җеқҠйҚ”зҠІеҹҢ Module ж¶“о…ЁзҙұйҚҡп№ҖеһҜеЁЈиҜІе§һйҚ’жқҝоҮ®жҗҙж—Ӯж®‘ PartCategory ж¶“?
     */
    private String fatherCode = "";

    /**
     * з’Ғпј„з•»й—ғиҲөоҶҢ
     * йҗўг„Өз°¬йҺёеӣ§з•ҫз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҰг„Ҙж‘ўж¶“оҒҮо…ёз» жҘ…жЁҒеЁҲеһ«еўҪзҗӣ?
     */
    private CalcStage calcStage = CalcStage.MID;

    /**
     * е®ёпёҝжҷ¶йҚ©зғҳжҡҹ
     */
    private Cardinality leftCardinality = Cardinality.ONE;

    /**
     * йҚҷе……жҷ¶йҚ©зғҳжҡҹ
     */
    private Cardinality rightCardinality = Cardinality.ONE;

    /**
     * жөЈж»…ж•Өй‘јеҶЁжҙҝ
     */
    private EffectScope effectScope = EffectScope.SingleInst;

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜе®ёпёҝжҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     * 
     * @return е®ёпёҝжҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getFromLeftProgObjs() {
        if (rawCode == null) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        return rawCode.getFromLeftProgObjs();
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҷе……жҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     * 
     * @return йҚҷе……жҷ¶еҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һвҖіеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getToRightProgObjs() {
        if (rawCode == null) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        return rawCode.getToRightProgObjs();
    }

    @JsonIgnore
    public String getLeftCategoryCode() {
        return getCategoryCode(getFromLeftProgObjs());
    }

    @JsonIgnore
    public String getRightCategoryCode() {
        return getCategoryCode(getToRightProgObjs());
    }

    @JsonIgnore
    private String getCategoryCode(List<RefProgObjSchema> refProgObjs) {
        if (refProgObjs == null || refProgObjs.isEmpty()) {
            return null;
        }
        for (RefProgObjSchema refProgObj : refProgObjs) {
            if (refProgObj.getProgObjType().equals(RefProgObjSchema.PROG_OBJ_TYPE_PARTCATEGORY)) {
                return refProgObj.getProgObjCode();
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

}

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;

import java.util.Optional;

/**
 * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·з”ҜжҗҒеҷәзҖ№ж°«з®ҹ
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬зјҒзҶ¶з«ҙз» пј„жӮҠз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·й”ӣеІ„дј©йҚҸе¶ҮвҖ–зјӮж «зҲңзҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“?
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
public final class RuleTypeConstants {

    private RuleTypeConstants() {
        // з»үдҪ№ж№ҒйҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒеё®зҙқй—ғеҸүо„ӣзҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҚ–?
    }

    // ==================== з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaз»«иҜІзҖ· ====================

    /**
     * йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҺ¬СҶоқүйҚ’ж¬‘иў«йҚЁ?
     */
    public static final String COMPATIABLE_RULE = "CompatiableRule";

    /**
     * з’Ғпј„з•»з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·
     */
    public static final String CALCULATE_RULE = "CalculateRule";

    /**
     * й–«еӨӢе«Ёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·
     */
    public static final String SELECT_RULE = "SelectRule";

    /**
     * жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСҶоқүйҚ’ж¬‘иў«йҚЁ?
     */
    public static final String PRIORITY_RULE = "PriorityRule";

    // ==================== з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ• ====================

    /**
     * йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҺ¬СҶоқүйҚ’ж¬‘иў«йҚЁе¬ӘеҸҸйҚҡ?
     */
    public static final String COMPATIABLE_RULE_FULL_NAME = "CDSL.V5.Struct.CompatiableRule";

    /**
     * з’Ғпј„з•»з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     */
    public static final String CALCULATE_RULE_FULL_NAME = "CDSL.V5.Struct.CalculateRule";

    /**
     * й–«еӨӢе«Ёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     */
    public static final String SELECT_RULE_FULL_NAME = "CDSL.V5.Struct.SelectRule";

    /**
     * жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСҶоқүйҚ’ж¬‘иў«йҚЁе¬ӘеҸҸйҚҡ?
     */
    public static final String PRIORITY_RULE_FULL_NAME = "CDSL.V5.Struct.PriorityRule";

    // ==================== йҺҝе¶„з¶”з»—пёҫиў«йҚЁ?====================

    /**
     * ж¶“е¶…еҗӢзҖ№и§„жҗ·жөЈж»…оғҒ
     */
    public static final String OPERATOR_INCOMPATIBLE = "Incompatible";

    /**
     * йҚҸеҚһз“ЁйҺ¬С„жҗ·жөЈж»…оғҒй”ӣең•odependentй”ӣ?
     */
    public static final String OPERATOR_CODEPENDENT = "CoDependent";

    /**
     * жёҡжҝҠзҰҶйҺҝе¶„з¶”з»—?
     */
    public static final String OPERATOR_REQUIRES = "Requires";

    // ==================== й–«еӨӢе«Ёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ· ====================

    /**
     * йҚ—жӣўвӮ¬еӨҢиў«йҚЁ?
     */
    public static final String SELECT_TYPE_SINGLE = "single";

    /**
     * жҫ¶ж°¶вӮ¬еӨҢиў«йҚЁ?
     */
    public static final String SELECT_TYPE_MULTIPLE = "multiple";

    // ==================== е®ёгғҘеҸҝйҸӮи§„зЎ¶ ====================

    /**
     * йҚ’гӮҶжҹҮйҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“е“„еҗӢзҖ№и§„вӮ¬СҶоқүйҚ’?
     * 
     * @param ruleSchemaTypeFullName з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     * @return йҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“е“„еҗӢзҖ№и§„вӮ¬СҶоқүйҚ’?
     */
    public static boolean isCompatiableRule(String ruleSchemaTypeFullName) {
        return ruleSchemaTypeFullName != null
                && ruleSchemaTypeFullName.contains(COMPATIABLE_RULE);
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’гӮҶжҹҮйҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“йёҝо…ёз» жҘ„оқүйҚ’?
     * 
     * @param ruleSchemaTypeFullName з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     * @return йҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“йёҝо…ёз» жҘ„оқүйҚ’?
     */
    public static boolean isCalculateRule(String ruleSchemaTypeFullName) {
        return ruleSchemaTypeFullName != null
                && ruleSchemaTypeFullName.contains(CALCULATE_RULE);
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’гӮҶжҹҮйҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“жҙӘвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     * 
     * @param ruleSchemaTypeFullName з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     * @return йҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“жҙӘвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     */
    public static boolean isSelectRule(String ruleSchemaTypeFullName) {
        return ruleSchemaTypeFullName != null
                && ruleSchemaTypeFullName.contains(SELECT_RULE);
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’гӮҶжҹҮйҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“иҪ°зҙӯйҚҸе ўйӘҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     * 
     * @param ruleSchemaTypeFullName з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜSchemaз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•
     * @return йҸ„оҲҡжғҒж¶“иҪ°зҙӯйҚҸе ўйӘҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     */
    public static boolean isPriorityRule(String ruleSchemaTypeFullName) {
        return ruleSchemaTypeFullName != null
                && ruleSchemaTypeFullName.contains(PRIORITY_RULE);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІзҖ·йҚҡе¶ҮРһй”ӣе ңзІ йҚҸг„ҘжӮ•ж¶“о…ҹеҪҒйҚҷж өзҙҡ

    /**
     * жқ©еӣЁжҠӨйҚ‘зғҳеҜҡзҖ№жӯ atherCodeйҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’?
     *
     * @param rules      йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬ҸеһӘзҗӣ?
     * @param fatherCode йҗ–еүҒйӘҮжө пҪҮзҲңй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»ҖиҙҹnullйҚ’ж¬’е№ҸйҚҷж ЁДҒйҚ§жҘғйӘҮйҚ’оӮӨж®‘з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     * @return жқ©еӣЁжҠӨйҚҡеәЈж®‘з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    protected List<Rule> filterRulesByFatherCode(List<Rule> rules, String fatherCode) {
        if (rules == null) {
            return new java.util.ArrayList<>();
        }
        return rules.stream()
                .filter(rule -> {
                    if (fatherCode == null) {
                        return rule.getFatherCode() == null || rule.getFatherCode().isEmpty();
                    }
                    return fatherCode.equals(rule.getFatherCode());
                })
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    /**
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒmodule.getAllRules()йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬җжҹҹеЁүжӣ ж®‘йҸ„зҠІзҡ 
     *
     * @param module еҰҜвҖіжҪЎзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @return з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжө пҪҮзҲңйҚ’зүҲжҹҹеЁүжӣһоҮ®з’һпј„ж®‘йҸ„зҠІзҡ 
     */
    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module) {
        return buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
    }

    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module, Object moduleAlgFile) {
        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null) {
            return new HashMap<>();
        }

        // й‘ҫеі°еҪҮиӨ°ж’іеў з»«иҚӨж®‘йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨӢжҹҹеЁү?
        Method[] methods = moduleAlgFile.getClass().getDeclaredMethods();
        Map<String, Method> allMethods = new HashMap<>();

        // йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҸӮи§„зЎ¶йҚҡе¶…еҹҢMethodзҖөзЎ…и–„йҗЁеӢ¬ж§§зҒҸ?
        for (Method method : methods) {
            allMethods.put(method.getName(), method);
        }

        // йҸҚи§„еөҒmodule.getAllRules()йҸүгғҰзҖҜеҜӨз°үuleMethods
        Map<String, Method> ruleMethods = new HashMap<>();
        for (Rule rule : module.getAllRules()) {
            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
            Method method = allMethods.get(ruleCode);
            if (method != null) {
                ruleMethods.put(ruleCode, method);
                log.info("Built rule method mapping: {} -> {}", ruleCode, method.getName());
                // // еҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢгғҰж§ёйҚҡпёҪж§ёPriorityRuleй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»„ж§ёйҚ’ж¬җзҖҜеҜӨиҪ°зҙӯйҚҸе ўйӘҮз»ҫпёҪжҪ«
                // if (RuleTypeConstants.isPriorityRule(rule.getRuleSchemaTypeFullName())) {
                // buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
                // }
            } else {
                log.warn("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
            }
        }

        log.info("Built {} rule methods from module rules", ruleMethods.size());
        return ruleMethods;
    }

    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(IModule module) {
        module.getPriorityRules().forEach(rule -> buildPriorityConstraint(rule));
        for (Rule rule : module.getPriorityRules()) {
            buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
        }
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢ«зј“жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫС…е®ійҸү?
     * 
     * @param rule з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜзҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(Rule rule) {
        if (rule.getRawCode() == null || !(rule.getRawCode() instanceof PriorityRuleSchema)) {
            log.warn("Rule rawCode is not PriorityRuleSchema for rule: {}", rule.getCode());
            return;
        }
        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = new PriorityConstraint();
        pConstraint.setRule(rule);
        setPriorityConstraint(pConstraint);
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе——еҪүй–Іеҝ“е•“йҚҘзӮІз“§еЁҲзўүзҙқж·ҮжҝҠзҳүз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҸ„оҲҡжӮ“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“?
     */
    protected void writeBackToFields(Object moduleAlgFile) {
        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = getAllFieldVariables(moduleAlgFile);
        // жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠPartVar
        for (Map.Entry<String, PartVarImpl> entry : partMap.entrySet()) {
            String code = entry.getKey();
            PartVarImpl partVar = entry.getValue();
            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
            if (field != null) {
                Object tVar = newPartVarForModuleField(moduleAlgFile, partVar, field);
                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
            }
        }

        // жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠParaVar
        for (Map.Entry<String, ParaVarImpl> entry : paraMap.entrySet()) {
            String code = entry.getKey();
            ParaVarImpl paraVar = entry.getValue();
            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
            if (field != null) {
                Object tVar = newParaVarForModuleField(moduleAlgFile, paraVar, field);
                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
            }
        }
    }

    protected void initRules(Object moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
        Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods = buildAllRuleMethods(module, moduleAlgFile);
        // йҚҸе ҹж№°йҹ¬оӮҘз№–ж¶“оҒ…ДҒйҚ§жҘғж®‘йҚ“е¶Үз–Ҷз» жҘҒзЎ¶

        // йҚҸе ҹзҖҜеҜӨзғҳж№°еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҗЁеӢӘзҙӯйҚҸе ўиў«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
        buildPriorityConstraint(module);

        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүmoduleйҸҲеЎ’artCategorysй”ӣеұҪеһҜзҖөи§„зҳЎж¶“зӢҝartCategoryйҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йӘһи·әеһөжҝ®е¬ӘеҜІPartCategoryAlgImpl
        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
            partCategoryAlgImpl.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
        }

        // йҺөСҶо”‘йҸҲо„ғйҹ©жқ©ж¬ҺйҮңеҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҗЁеӢ«жӮ—зјғоҶҫз•»еЁү?
        this.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
    }

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒйҸҲеӨүзҙӯйҚҸе ўиў«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     * 
     * @return exr
     */
    public boolean hasPriorityRule() {
        return !getAllPriorityConstraintMap().isEmpty();
    }

    private Map<String, PriorityConstraint> getAllPriorityConstraintMap() {
        // ruleCode -> PriorityConstraint
        Map<String, PriorityConstraint> priorityConstraints = new HashMap<>();
        if (getPriorityConstraint() != null) {
            priorityConstraints.put(getPriorityConstraint().getRule().getCode(), getPriorityConstraint());
        }
        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
            PriorityConstraint priorityConstraint = ((ModuleBaseAlgImpl) partCategoryAlgImpl).getPriorityConstraint();
            if (priorityConstraint != null) {
                priorityConstraints.put(
                        priorityConstraint.getRule().getCode(), priorityConstraint);
            }
        }
        return priorityConstraints;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҢж®‘PriorityйҚҡе қиӢҹйҚҡеәЈж®‘зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?
     *
     * @return exr
     */
    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr() {
        PartAlgCPLinearExpr mergedExpr = model.newPartLinearExpr("merged_priority_expr");
        for (PriorityConstraint pc : getAllPriorityConstraintMap().values()) {
            Rule rule = pc.getRule();
            PriorityRuleSchema schema = (PriorityRuleSchema) rule.getRawCode();
            PriorityStrategy strategy = schema.getPriorityStrategy();
            // int weight = schema.getWeight();
            int coff = strategy == PriorityStrategy.MAX ? -1 : 1;
            mergedExpr.addExpr(pc.getExpr(), coff);
        }
        return mergedExpr;
    }

    /**
     * Update or create priority objective function for given attribute code.
     *
     * @param attrCode attribute code
     * @param expr     expression containing part-term metadata and numeric terms
     */
    public void updatePriorityObjectFuntion(String ruleCode, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
        if (ruleCode == null || ruleCode.isEmpty()) {
            log.warn("ruleCode is null or empty, skip updating priority objective");
            return;
        }
        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = getAllPriorityConstraintMap().get(ruleCode);
        if (pConstraint == null) {
            log.error("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: {}", ruleCode);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: " + ruleCode);
        }
        pConstraint.setExpr(expr);
        log.info("Updated priority objective for ruleCode {}: expr={}", ruleCode,
                expr != null ? expr.toString() : "null");

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * й—ҲгҲ жӮңзјҒеӯҳе§ўйҺ¬дҪәж®‘зјҒж’ҙзҖҜйҚ–ж §оҮ®з’һвҖізқҳйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҠҶ? *
 * @since 2026-05-19
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class StructExprSchema extends ExprSchema {
    private String objectType = RefProgObjSchema.PROG_OBJ_TYPE_PARTCATEGORY;

    private String objectCode;

    private String attrCode;

    private StructCompareOperator operator;

    private List<String> values = new ArrayList<>();

    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getRefProgObjs() {
        List<RefProgObjSchema> refs = new ArrayList<>();
        if (objectCode != null && !objectCode.isEmpty()) {
            refs.add(new RefProgObjSchema(objectType, objectCode, attrCode));
        }
        refs.addAll(super.getRefProgObjs());
        return refs;
    }
}

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;

import lombok.Data;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * зјҒж’ҙзҖҜйҚ–ж ¬оқүйҚ’ж¬ҸзқҚеҜ®вӮ¬йҚҡеәЈж®‘й–®г„Өж¬ўзјӮж «зҲңзјҒеӢ«жӮҺйҠҶ? *
 * @since 2026-05-19
 */
@Data
public class PartCombination {
    private String code1;

    private String code2;

    private String code3;

    private String sourceSubRuleCode;

    public PartCombination() {
    }

    public PartCombination(String code1, String code2, String sourceSubRuleCode) {
        this.code1 = code1;
        this.code2 = code2;
        this.sourceSubRuleCode = sourceSubRuleCode;
    }

    public PartCombination(String code1, String code2, String code3, String sourceSubRuleCode) {
        this.code1 = code1;
        this.code2 = code2;
        this.code3 = code3;
        this.sourceSubRuleCode = sourceSubRuleCode;
    }

    public List<String> getCodes(int arity) {
        List<String> codes = new ArrayList<>();
        if (arity >= 1) {
            codes.add(code1);
        }
        if (arity >= 2) {
            codes.add(code2);
        }
        if (arity >= 3) {
            codes.add(code3);
        }
        if (arity < 1 || arity > 3) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported arity: " + arity);
        }
        return codes;
    }
}
```
</details></tool-use>

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Build & Test Commands

```bash
# Build (Java 21, Maven 3.6+)
mvn clean compile

# Run all tests
mvn test

# Run a specific test class
mvn test -Dtest=FilterExpressionExecutorTest

# Run a specific test method
mvn test -Dtest=CalculateRuleIfThenTest#testCalculateRule

# Run with exec plugin
mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="com.jmix.configengine.Main"
```

Lombok is used throughout вҖ” ensure annotation processing is enabled in your IDE. Checkstyle config exists at `checkstyle.xml` but is commented out in `pom.xml`.

## Architecture

This is a **constraint-based configuration engine** that uses Google OR-Tools (CP-SAT solver) to reason about product configurations. The system models products as Modules with Params, Parts, and Rules, then uses the CP-SAT solver to find valid configurations or infer parameter values.

### Layer Model

```
config data (Module/Para/Part/Rule)
       |
       v
Constraint solver (OR-Tools CP-SAT wrapper)
       |
       v
Solution enumeration (ModuleInst/ParaInst/PartInst)
```

### Package Structure

**`com.jmix.executor`** вҖ” Runtime constraint solving engine:
- `bmodel/` вҖ” Business domain model: `Module`, `ModuleBase`, `Para`, `Part`, `PartCategory`, `Rule`, and rule schemas (`CompatiableRuleSchema`, `CalculateRuleSchema`, `CodeRuleSchema`, `PriorityRuleSchema`). `ModuleBase` extends `Onto` and serves as the common base for both `Module` and `PartCategory` (they share the same structure of params + parts + rules).
- `cmodel/` вҖ” Configuration instance model: `ModuleInst`, `ParaInst`, `PartInst`, `SolverResult` вҖ” these represent solver output, not input.
- `impl/algmodel/` вҖ” OR-Tools CP-SAT wrapper: `AlgCPModel`, `AlgCPConstraint`, `AlgCPLinearExpr`, plus variable types (`ParaVar`, `PartVar`, `PartCategoryVar`, `RelaxVar`). `ModuleAlgImpl` extends `ModuleBaseAlgImpl` and is the key class that builds CP-SAT constraints from Module data.
- `southinf/` вҖ” "Southbound interfaces" that generated code implements: `IModuleAlg`, `IConstraintFunction`, `IPartCategoryFunction`.
- `ModuleConstraintExecutor` вҖ” Singleton entry point (via `INST` field). Only interface external callers should use. Provides `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/registerExtensible`.
- `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl` вҖ” Implementation with priority-based layered solving, incremental model loading, and conflict detection via relax variables.

**`com.jmix.tool`** вҖ” Code generation tooling:
- `artbuilder/ModuleAlgArtifactGenerator` вҖ” Uses FreeMarker to generate Java constraint code from Module definitions using `ModuleConstraintTemplate.ftl`.
- `bbuilder/ModuleGenneratorByAnno` вҖ” Builds `Module` instances from annotation-decorated classes at runtime.
- `impl/ModuleGenerator` вҖ” LLM-based code generation (via Spring AI).
- `impl/ModulePacker` / `ModuleCompiler` / `ModuleRunner` вҖ” Dynamic compilation and execution pipeline.

### Key Patterns

- **Annotation-driven module definition in tests**: Use `@ModuleAnno`, `@ParaAnno`, `@PartAnno`, `@CodeRuleAnno`, `@CompatiableRuleAnno`, `@PriorityRuleAnno` on a class extending `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase`. These annotations auto-generate the `Module` object.
- **Test base classes**: `ModuleScenarioTestBase` for integration tests (full init вҶ’ solve вҶ’ assert pipeline), `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase` for constraint algorithm definition.
- **PartCategory** shares the same structure as Module (extends `ModuleBase`), supporting nested constraint hierarchies and multi-instance (MultiInstPartCategory) scenarios.
- **Solver supports**: single solution, all solutions enumeration (`enumerateAllSolution`), priority-layered solving, and conflict detection via relax variables.

## Code Style

- **Log messages MUST be in English** вҖ” this is a hard rule from `.cursorrules`. Use `log.info("User authentication successful")` not `log.info("з”ЁжҲ·и®ӨиҜҒжҲҗеҠҹ")`.
- **Existing Chinese comments and natural-language metadata MUST stay Chinese** вҖ” do not translate existing JavaDoc, inline comments, annotation text such as `normalNaturalCode`, or JSON natural-language fields into English.
- **Edit Chinese text as UTF-8 only** вҖ” never save Java/JSON/Markdown files through a non-UTF-8 encoding path. Before committing, scan for mojibake markers such as replacement character `U+FFFD`, private-use characters, and common mojibake code points such as `U+9205`, `U+9227`, `U+95BA`, `U+940E`, `U+9346`, `U+95B0`, `U+6D60`, `U+93C4`, `U+7459`, `U+59AF`, `U+7029`, `U+95AE`, `U+9359`, `U+9352`, `U+93C1`, `U+9422`, `U+93AC`.
- **Comments may use Chinese** вҖ” JavaDoc and inline comments can use Chinese for explaining complex business logic.
- Communication with this user should be in simplified C
... (truncated)
```

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.LinearExpr;
import com.google.ortools.sat.LinearExprBuilder;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.AbstractMap;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * з»ҫжҢҺвӮ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҸӢеӢ«зј“йҚЈг„ҘеҜҳз‘Ғе‘ӯж«’
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬з’әзҶ»йҮңйҸӢеӢ«зј“з»ҫжҢҺвӮ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҸғеүҒж®‘йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨүдҝҠйҺӯоҲӨзҙқжёҡеӨёз°¬йҸғгғҘз№”з’Ғжқҝз¶ҚйҚңеІғзҡҹз’Ү?
 */
@Slf4j
@Data
public class AlgCPLinearExpr {

    private LinearExprBuilder builder;

    private List<Map.Entry<String, String>> terms;

    private String name;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒз»Ң?
     *
     * @return
     */
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return terms.isEmpty();
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҙҹж¶“оҒҲгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯеҡҺйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎ
     *
     * @param var         йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param coefficient з»Ҝз»ҳжҡҹ
     * @return йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr term(AlgCPLinearExpr var, long coefficient) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("term_" + var.getName() + "_" + coefficient);
        expr.addExpr(var, coefficient);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҙҹж¶“оҒҲгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯеҡҺйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎ
     *
     * @param var         йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param coefficient з»Ҝз»ҳжҡҹ
     * @return йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr term(IntVar var, long coefficient) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("term_" + var.getName() + "_" + coefficient);
        expr.addTerm(var, coefficient);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҙҹж¶“оҒҲгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯеҡҺйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎ
     *
     * @param var         йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param coefficient з»Ҝз»ҳжҡҹ
     * @return йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr term(BoolVar var, long coefficient) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("term_" + var.getName() + "_" + coefficient);
        expr.addTerm(var, coefficient);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * зҖөз‘°оҳҝж¶“зӢқlgCPLinearExprе§№еӮҡжӢ°
     *
     * @param expressions з‘•дҪ№зң°йҚңеІҖж®‘зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®еҝ”жҡҹзјҒ?
     * @return е§№еӮҡжӢ°йҚҡеәЈж®‘AlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr sum(AlgCPLinearExpr... expressions) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr result = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_" + expressions.length + "_alg_exprs");
        for (AlgCPLinearExpr expr : expressions) {
            result.builder.add(expr.build());
            result.terms.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>("+ (" + expr.toString() + ")", expr.getName()));
        }
        log.debug("Created sum expression with {} AlgCPLinearExpr terms", expressions.length);
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * зҖөз‘°оҳҝж¶“зӢқlgCPLinearExprе§№еӮҡжӢ°
     *
     * @param expressions з‘•дҪ№зң°йҚңеІҖж®‘зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®еҝӣжіҰйҚҡ?
     * @return е§№еӮҡжӢ°йҚҡеәЈж®‘AlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr sumAlgCP(Iterable<AlgCPLinearExpr> expressions) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr result = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_algcp_iterable_exprs");
        int count = 0;
        for (AlgCPLinearExpr expr : expressions) {
            result.builder.add(expr.build());
            result.terms.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>("+ (" + expr.toString() + ")", expr.getName()));
            count++;
        }
        log.debug("Created sum expression with {} AlgCPLinearExpr terms from iterable", count);
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“з”ҜжҗҒеҷәзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?
     *
     * @param value з”ҜжҗҒеҷәйҚҠ?
     * @return з”ҜжҗҒеҷәAlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr constant(long value) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("constant_" + value);
        expr.addConstant(value);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“зјӮв•Ӯж–Ғзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?
     *
     * @param var   йҚҷж©Җеҷә

     * @return зјӮв•Ӯж–ҒйҚҡеәЈж®‘AlgCPLinearExpr

    /**

    public static AlgCPLinearExpr scaled(BoolVar var, long scale) {
        return term(var, scale);

    /**

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.IPart;

/**
 * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚҷж©Җеҷә
 * зҗӣг„§гҒҡз»ҫпёҪжҪ«е§№еӮқР’ж¶“о… ж®‘й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚҷж©Җеҷәй”ӣеұҪеҜҳйҚҡоӮЈжҡҹй–Іеҝ“жӢ°й—…ж„ҜжЈҢйҗҳиҲөвӮ¬?
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */

public class StructExprSchema extends ExprSchema {
    private String objectType = RefProgObjSchema.PROG_OBJ_TYPE_PARTCATEGORY;

    private String objectCode;

    private String attrCode;

    private StructCompareOperator operator;

    private List<String> values = new ArrayList<>();

    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getRefProgObjs() {
        List<RefProgObjSchema> refs = new ArrayList<>();
        if (objectCode != null && !objectCode.isEmpty()) {
            refs.add(new RefProgObjSchema(objectType, objectCode, attrCode));
        }
        refs.addAll(super.getRefProgObjs());
        return refs;
    }

/**
 * иҝҮж»ӨиЎЁиҫҫејҸжү§иЎҢеҷЁ

    // ж“ҚдҪңз¬ҰеёёйҮҸ
    public static final String OP_EQUALS = "=";
    public static final String OP_EQUALS_DOUBLE = "==";
    public static final String OP_NOT_EQUALS = "!=";
    public static final String OP_GREATER_THAN = ">";
    public static final String OP_LESS_THAN = "<";
    public static final String OP_GREATER_EQUALS = ">=";
    public static final String OP_LESS_EQUALS = "<=";
    public static final String OP_LIKE = "like";
    public static final String OP_NOT_LIKE = "not like";

    private static final Pattern FILTER_PATTERN = Pattern
            .compile("(\\w+)\\s*([=!<>]+|not\\s+like|like)\\s*\"?([^\"]*)\"?");
    private static final Pattern MULTI_CONDITION_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("\\s+and\\s+", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE);

     */
    private FilterExpressionExecutor() {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Utility class cannot be instantiated");
    }

    /**
     * Filter condition representation
     */
    @Data
    @AllArgsConstructor
    public static class FilterCondition {

        private final String fieldName;

         */
        private final List<FilterCondition> subConditions;

        /**
         * еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰдёәеӨҚеҗҲжқЎд»¶пјҲAND жқЎд»¶пјү
         */
        public boolean isCompound() {
            return subConditions != null && !subConditions.isEmpty();
        }

        /**
         * еҲӣе»әз®ҖеҚ•жқЎд»¶

        }

        /**
         * еҲӣе»әеӨҚеҗҲжқЎд»¶пјҲANDпјү

    }

    private void getAllPartCategorys(PartCategory category, List<PartCategory> allPartCategories) {
        allPartCategories.add(category);
        for (PartCategory pc : category.getPartCategorys()) {
            getAllPartCategorys(pc, allPartCategories);
        }
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–йғЁд»¶
     * 
     * @return
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public IPart getPart(String code) {
        return getAllParts().stream().filter(part -> part.getCode().equals(code)).findFirst().orElse(null);
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–жүҖжңүйғЁд»¶
     * 
     * @return
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<Part> getAllAtomicParts() {
        List<Part> allAtomicParts = new ArrayList<>();
        allAtomicParts.addAll(atomicParts);
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            allAtomicParts.addAll(partCategory.getAtomicParts());
        }
        return allAtomicParts;
    }

    /**
     * ж №жҚ®йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»зј–з ҒиҺ·еҸ–еҺҹеӯҗйғЁд»¶еҲ—иЎЁ

     * @return жҢҮе®ҡеҲҶзұ»дёӢзҡ„еҺҹеӯҗйғЁд»¶еҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<Part> getAllAtomicParts(String partCategoryCode) {
        List<Part> result = new ArrayList<>();
        PartCategory category = getPartCategory(partCategoryCode);
        if (category != null) {
            result.addAll(category.getAllAtomicParts());
        }
        return result;
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<Para> getPara(String code) {
        Optional<Para> result = super.getPara(code);
        if (result.isPresent()) {
            return result;
        }
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            result = partCategory.getPara(code);
            if (result.isPresent()) {
                return result;
            }
        }
        return Optional.empty();
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<Rule> getRule(String code) {
        Optional<Rule> result = super.getRule(code);
        if (result.isPresent()) {
            return result;
        }
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            result = partCategory.getRule(code);
            if (result.isPresent()) {
                return result;
            }
        }
        return Optional.empty();
    }

    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
    public static class CompatibleRuleIncompatibleConstraint extends ModuleAlgBase {

        @ParaAnno(options = { "a1", "a2", "a3", "a4", "a5" })
        private ParaVar aVar;

        @ParaAnno(options = { "b1", "b2", "b3", "b4", "b5" })
        private ParaVar bVar;

        @CodeRuleAnno()
        private void initConstraint() {
            // жіЁж„Ҹпјҡ дёҖе®ҡиҰҒйҖүжӢ©дёҖдёӘеҖјжҖҺд№ҲзҗҶи§ЈпјҲеҰӮжһңдёҚйҖүжӢ©пјҢд№ҹи®ҫзҪ®дёҖдёӘеҸҜйҖүеҖје°ұеҸҜд»ҘиЎЁиҫҫпјҢиҝҷж ·жЁЎеһӢз»ҹдёҖдәҶпјү
            // A=(a1,a2,a3,a4,a5),aVar.valueзҡ„еҖјеҹҹ
            // B=(b1,b2,b3,b4,b5),bVar.valueзҡ„еҖјеҹҹ
            // и§„еҲҷеҶ…е®№пјҡ(a1,a3) Incompatible
            // (b1,b2,b3)пјҢеҲҷCA=(a1,a3),CB=(b1,b2,b3),NCA=(a2,a4,a5),NCB=(b4,b5)
            // и§ЈиҜ»пјҡ
            // 1гҖҒжӯЈеҗ‘
            // 1.1
            // еҰӮжһңaVar.valueеҸ–CAзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖј(еңЁCAдёӯ)пјҢеҲҷbVar.valueдёҖе®ҡдёҚжҳҜCBзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖјпјҢеҸ–CBеҶ…зҡ„еҖјжҳҜйқһжі•зҡ„пјҢеҸӘиғҪжҳҜNCBеҶ…зҡ„еҖјпјҢеҰӮ:еҰӮжһңaVar.var=a1,еҲҷbVar.var=b4жҲ–b5(NCB),дёҚеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜb1
            // жҲ– b2 жҲ– b3(CB)
            // 1.2
            // еҰӮжһңaVar.valueеҸ–NCAдёҖдёӘеҖј(дёҚеңЁCAдёӯ)пјҢеҲҷbVar.valueеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜCBзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖјпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜNCBзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖјпјҢеҰӮпјҡеҰӮжһңaVar.var=a2,еҲҷbVar.var=b1жҲ–b2жҲ–b3(CB),д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜb4жҲ–b5(NCB)
            // 2.еҸҚеҗ‘
            // 2.1
            // еҰӮжһңbVar.valueеҸ–CBзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖј(еңЁCBдёӯ)пјҢеҲҷaVar.valueдёҖе®ҡдёҚжҳҜCAзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖјпјҢеҸ–CAеҶ…зҡ„еҖјжҳҜйқһжі•зҡ„пјҢеҸӘиғҪжҳҜNCAеҶ…зҡ„еҖјпјҢеҰӮ:еҰӮжһңbVar.var=b1,еҲҷaVar.var=a2жҲ–a4жҲ–a5(NCA),дёҚеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜa1
            // жҲ– a3(CA)
            // 2.2
            // еҰӮжһңbVar.valueеҸ–NCBдёҖдёӘеҖј(дёҚеңЁCBдёӯ)пјҢеҲҷaVar.valueеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜCAзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖјпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜNCAзҡ„дёҖдёӘеҖјпјҢеҰӮпјҡеҰӮжһңbVar.var=b4,еҲҷaVar.var=a1
            // жҲ– a3(CA),д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜa2 жҲ– a4жҲ–a5(NCA)
            // дҪҝз”ЁжіӣеҢ–зҡ„IncompatibleзәҰжқҹж–№жі•
            addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible("rule1", aVar, Arrays.asList("a1", "a3"), bVar,
                    Arrays.asList("b1", "b2", "b3"));

            // еҲӣе»әжқЎд»¶еҸҳйҮҸпјҡAеңЁCAдёӯ
            AlgCPBoolVar inCA = model().newBoolVar("inCA");
            model().addBoolOr(new AlgCPLiteral[] {
                    aVar.option("a1").selectedVar(),
                    aVar.option("a3").selectedVar()

            model().addBoolAnd(new AlgCPLiteral[] {

                    bVar.option("b3").selectedVar().not()

                    aVar.option("a2").selectedVar(),

            }).onlyEnforceIf(notInCA);

/**

 */
@Slf4j
public class PostCalcRuleTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    public PostCalcRuleTest() {
        super(PostCalcConstraint.class);
    }

    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
    public static class PostCalcConstraint extends ModuleAlgBase {

        @PartAnno(code = "drive")
        @DAttrAnno2(code = "Speed", dynAttrType = DynamicAttributeType.E_STRING,
                options = {"Speed_5400:5400"})
        @DAttrAnno3(code = "Capacity", dynAttrType = DynamicAttributeType.E_INT,
                options = {"Capacity_1T:1", "Capacity_3T:3"})
        private PartCategoryVar drive;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"5400", "1"})
        private PartVar md1;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"5400", "3"})
        private PartVar sd1;

        @ParaAnno(fatherCode = "drive", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
        private ParaVar Sum_Quantity;

        @ParaAnno(code = "pDriveSumCapacity", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
        private ParaVar pDriveSumCapacity;

        @ParaAnno(code = "pFirstCapacity", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
        private ParaVar pFirstCapacity;

        @ParaAnno(code = "pDriveQuantity", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
        private ParaVar pDriveQuantity;

        @ParaAnno(code = "pDriveAttrCount", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
        private ParaVar pDriveAttrCount;

        @ParaAnno(fatherCode = "drive", code = "pSumCapacity",
                type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
        private ParaVar pSumCapacity;

        @CodeRuleAnno(calcStage = CalcStage.POST)
        private void postRule() {
            int sum = partCategorySum("drive").sumDynAttr4Int("Capacity");
            parameter("pDriveSumCapacity").setValue(String.valueOf(sum));
            partCategory("drive").parameter("pSumCapacity").setValue(String.valueOf(sum));
            parameter("pFirstCapacity").setValue(partCategorySum("drive").dynAttr("Capacity"));
            parameter("pDriveQuantity").setValue(String.valueOf(partCategory("drive").sumQuantity()));
            parameter("pDriveAttrCount").setValue(String.valueOf(partCategorySum("drive").dynAttrs("Capacity").size()));
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
    }

    @Test
    public void testPostCalc_ModuleAndCategoryPara() {
        inferRecommendModule("drive:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400");
        printSolutions();

        resultAssert().assertSuccess();
        assertEquals(3, getSolutions().size(), "Should have 3 solutions");

        // йӘҢиҜҒжҜҸдёӘи§Јзҡ„POSTеҸӮж•°е·ІеҶҷе…Ҙ(йҖҡиҝҮParaInst.valueжЈҖжҹҘ)
        for (ModuleInst sol : getSolutions()) {
            String driveSumCapacity = findParaValue(sol, "pDriveSumCapacity");
            assertTrue(driveSumCapacity != null && !driveSumCapacity.isEmpty(),
                    "pDriveSumCapacity should be set by POST rule");

            String driveQuantity = findParaValue(sol, "pDriveQuantity");
            assertTrue(driveQuantity != null && !driveQuantity.isEmpty(),
                    "pDriveQuantity should be set by POST rule");
        }
    }

        inferRecommendModule("drive:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400");
        printSolutions();

        resultAssert().assertSuccess();

        // еңЁи§Јmd1(Q:1,S:1), sd1(Q:1,S

/**
 * йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»зә§з®—жі•е®һзҺ°

@Slf4j
public class SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl extends ModuleBaseAlgImpl implements PartCategoryAlgImpl {
    /**
     * е®һдҫӢID
     */
    private int instId = ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;

    /**
     * й»ҳи®Өжһ„йҖ еҮҪж•°
     */
    public SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl() {
        super();
    }

    @Override
    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module, IModuleInput moduleInput,
            Object moduleAlgFile) {
        PartCategoryInput input = (PartCategoryInput) moduleInput;
        this.instId = input.getInstId();
        super.initData(model, module, moduleInput, moduleAlgFile);
    }

    @Override
    public void initInput(Object moduleAlgFile) {
        PartCategoryInput input = (PartCategoryInput) (this.moduleInput);
        newAttrParaVar(input.getSumAttrParas());
        super.initInput(moduleAlgFile);
        setPartCategoryInput(input);
    }

    public void initRules(Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods, Object moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
        super.buildPriorityConstraint(getModule()); // е…Ҳжһ„е»әжң¬йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»зҡ„дјҳе…Ҳзұ»и§„еҲҷ
        super.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–е®һдҫӢID
     * 
     * @return е®һдҫӢID
     */
    public int getInstId() {
        return getPartCategory().isEnumMutiInst() ? getPartCategory().getEnumInstId() : instId;
    }

    public PartCategory getPartCategory() {
        return (PartCategory) getModule();
    }

    public String getCategoryCode() {
        return getPartCategory().getCode();
    }

    @Override
    protected Object newPartVar(PartVarImpl internalPartVar) {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Unimplemented method 'newPartVar'");
    }

    @Override
    protected Object newParaVar(ParaVarImpl internalParaVar) {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Unimplemented method 'newParaVar'");
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return getPartCategory().getCode() + "[" + getPartCategory().getEnumInstId() + "]";
    }

    @Override
    public List<Part> getAllAtomicParts() {
        return getPartCategory().getAllAtomicParts();
    }

    @Override
    public List<Part> getAtomicParts() {
        return getPartCategory().getAtomicParts();
    }

    public ParaVarImpl getSumSumParaByAttr(String attrCode) {
        // еҰӮжһңдёҖдёӘж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡе®һдҫӢзҡ„еҲҶзұ»пјҢд»…еҲқе§ӢеҢ–дәҶдёҖдёӘеҲҶзұ»пјҢеҲҷйңҖиҰҒжҠҠи®ҝй—®sumsumиҪ¬еҸҳдёәsumзҡ„и®ҝй—®
        return getSumParaByAttr(attrCode);
    }

    public ParaVarImpl getSumParaByAttr(String attrCode) {
        ParaVarImpl paraVar = super.getParaVar(AttrParaType.Sum.name() + AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR + attrCode);
        if (paraVar == null) {
            log.error("ParaVarImpl not found for attrCode: {}", attrCode);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVarImpl not found for attrCode: " + attrCode);
        }
        return paraVar;
    }

    public ParaVarImpl getSumParaByAttrInternal(String attrCode) {
        ParaVarImpl paraVar = paraMap.get(AttrParaType.Sum.name() + AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR + attrCode);
        return paraVar;
    }

        operator.applyConstraint(model, sumFunExpr, partConstraint.getLeftValue());

    private PartsExpr filterPartExpr(String partExprStr, boolean isLeft) {
        if (partExprStr == null || partExprStr.isEmpty()) {
            // жү“ж—Ҙеҝ—пјҢжҠӣејӮеёё
            log.error("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
        }
        PartsExpr partsExpr = new PartsExpr();
        // и§ЈжһҗpartCategoryCodeе’ҢfilterConditionStr
        String partCategoryCode = "";
        String filterConditionStr = "";

        int colonIndex = partExprStr.indexOf(':');
        if (colonIndex > 0) {
            partCategoryCode = partExprStr.substring(0, colonIndex);
            filterConditionStr = partExprStr.substring(colonIndex + 1);
        } else {
            // жү“ж—Ҙеҝ—пјҢжҠӣејӮеёё
            log.error("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
        }

        partsExpr.setFilterConditionStr(filterConditionStr);

        PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl = isLeft ? currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl
                : currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
            // е…је®№д»ҘеүҚзҡ„
            partCategoryAlgImpl = this.getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
        } else {
            if (!partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode().equals(partCategoryCode)) {
                // жү“ж—Ҙеҝ—пјҢжҠӣејӮеёё
                log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
                throw new AlgLoaderException("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
            }
        }

        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
            // жү“ж—Ҙеҝ—пјҢжҠӣејӮеёё
            log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
            return partsExpr;
        }
        // иҪ¬жҚўдёәPartVar
        partsExpr.setPartVars(partCategoryAlgImpl.getAllPartVars(""));
        Pair<List<PartVarImpl>, List<PartVarImpl>> partVars = partCategoryAlgImpl.filterAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
        partsExpr.setFilterPartVars(partVars.getFirst());
        partsExpr.setNoFilterPartVars(partVars.getSecond());
        return partsExpr;
    }

    // /**
    // * и§ЈжһҗйғЁд»¶иЎЁиҫҫејҸеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ

package com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartType;

import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy;
import java.lang.annotation.Target;

/**
 * йғЁд»¶жіЁи§ЈпјҢз”ЁдәҺж Үи®°йғЁд»¶еҸҳйҮҸ
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Target({ ElementType.FIELD, ElementType.TYPE })
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface PartAnno {
    /**
     * йғЁд»¶зј–з Ғ
     */
    String code() default "";

    /**
     * зҲ¶еҜ№иұЎзј–з Ғ
     */
    String fatherCode() default "";

    /**
     * й»ҳи®ӨеҖј
     */
    String defaultValue() default "";

    /**
     * жҸҸиҝ°дҝЎжҒҜ
     */
    String description() default "";

    /**
     * жҺ’еәҸеҸ·
     */
    int sortNo() default 0;

    /**
     * йғЁд»¶зұ»еһӢ
     */
    PartType type() default PartType.ATOMIC;

    /**
     * д»·ж ј
     */
    long price() default 0L;

    /**
     * и§„ж јеұһжҖ§
     */
    String[] attrs() default {};

    /**
     * жү©еұ•жЁЎејҸ
     */
    String extSchema() default "";

    /**
     * жү©еұ•еұһжҖ§
     */
    String[] extAttrs() default {};

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢ1и§„ж јеұһжҖ§
     */
    String[] attrsInst1() default {};

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢ2и§„ж јеұһжҖ§
     */
    String[] attrsInst2() default {};

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢ3и§„ж јеұһжҖ§
     */
    String[] attrsInst3() default {};

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢ4и§„ж јеұһжҖ§
     */
    String[] attrsInst4() default {};

    /**
     * жңҖеӨ§ж•°йҮҸйҷҗеҲ¶
     * з”ЁдәҺзәҰжқҹйғЁд»¶зҡ„жңҖеӨ§ж•°йҮҸеҖј
     */
    int maxQuantity() default Part.MAX_QUANTITY;

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢcodeеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    String instCodes() default "";

    /**
     * жҳҜеҗҰж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡе®һдҫӢ
     * з”ЁдәҺзәҰжқҹз®—жі•зҡ„еӨҡе®һдҫӢеӨ„зҗҶпјҢй»ҳи®Өдёәfalse

     */
    boolean supportMultiInst() default false;
}

        // еҲқе§ӢеҢ– paraMap
        if (paras != null) {
            for (Para para : paras) {
                paraMap.put(para.getCode(), para);
            }
        }
        // е…¶д»–еҲқе§ӢеҢ–йҖ»иҫ‘е°ҶеңЁModuleзҡ„initж–№жі•дёӯе®һзҺ°
    }

    @JsonIgnore
    public List<AttrPara> getAttrParas(AttrParaType type) {
        return attrParas.stream()
                .filter(attrPara -> attrPara.getType() == type)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    /**
     * еҲқе§ӢеҢ–зҹӯд»Јз Ғ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public int initShortCode(int startIndex) {
        int index = startIndex;
        for (Para para : getParas()) {
            if (para.getCode().length() <= 3) { // еҰӮжһңзј–з Ғй•ҝеәҰе°ҸдәҺзӯүдәҺ3пјҢеҲҷзӣҙжҺҘдҪҝз”Ёзј–з Ғ
                para.setShortCode(para.getCode());
            } else {
                para.setShortCode(Para.SHORT_CODE_PREFIX + index);
                index++;
            }
        }
        return index;
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–и§„ж јеұһжҖ§еҖј
     *
     * @param key еұһжҖ§й”®
     * @return еұһжҖ§еҖј
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public String getAttr(String key) {
        return getDynAttr().get(key);
    }

    /**
     * и®ҫзҪ®и§„ж јеұһжҖ§еҖј
     *
     * @param key   еұһжҖ§й”®
     * @param value еұһжҖ§еҖј
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public void setAttr(String key, String value) {
        getDynAttr().put(key, value);
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–е®һдҫӢеұһжҖ§еҖј
     *
     * @return е®һдҫӢеұһжҖ§еҖјеҜ№иұЎ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public InstanceDynAttrValue getInstanceAttrs() {
        String instanceAttrsStr = this.getAttr(INSTANCE_ATTRS);
        if (instanceAttrsStr == null || instanceAttrsStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
            return null;
        }
        return InstanceDynAttrValue.fromJsonString(instanceAttrsStr);
    }

    /**
     * жҹҘиҜўе®һдҫӢзұ»еһӢзҡ„еҠЁжҖҒеұһжҖ§е®ҡд№ү

    @JsonIgnore
    public List<DynamicAttribute> queryDynAttrSchemas4Inst() {
        return getDynAttrSchemas().stream()
                .filter(attr -> attr.getInstType() == 1)
                .toList();
    }

package com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.attr.DynamicAttributeType;

import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy;
import java.lang.annotation.Target;

/**
 * еҠЁжҖҒеұһжҖ§жіЁи§Ј1
 * з”ЁдәҺж Үи®°еҠЁжҖҒеұһжҖ§е®ҡд№ү
 *
 * @since 2025-12-27
 */
@Target({ElementType.FIELD, ElementType.TYPE})
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface DAttrAnno1 {
    /**
     * еұһжҖ§зј–з Ғ
     */
    String code() default "";

    /**
     * жү©еұ•жЁЎејҸ
     */
    String optionExtSchema() default "";

    /**
     * еҸҜйҖүеҖјеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    String[] options() default {};

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢзұ»еһӢ
     */
    int instType() default 0;

    /**
     * еҠЁжҖҒеұһжҖ§зұ»еһӢ
     */
    DynamicAttributeType dynAttrType() default DynamicAttributeType.E_INT;
}

        return partMap.get(code);
    }

    /**
     * Return list of atomic parts used by sum4Selected, optionally filtered by
     * condition.
     *
     * @param filtedConditionStr filter expression, may be null
     * @return filtered list of atomic parts
     */
    public List<PartVarImpl> getInternalPartVars(String filtedConditionStr) {
        List<Part> atomicParts = currentModule.getAtomicParts();
        if (filtedConditionStr != null && !filtedConditionStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
            atomicParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(atomicParts, filtedConditionStr);
            log.info("Priority-Filtered parts: {} in getPartVars", PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts));
        }
        List<PartVarImpl> partVars = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Part part : atomicParts) {
            partVars.add(currentModuleAlg.getPartVar(part.getCode()));
        }
        return partVars;
    }

    protected ParaOptionVarImpl createParaOptionVar(String paraCode, String optionCode) {

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–жүҖжңүи§„еҲҷеҲ—иЎЁпјҲеҢ…жӢ¬еӯҗеҲҶзұ»дёӯзҡ„и§„еҲҷпјү
     * йҖ’еҪ’ж”¶йӣҶжүҖжңүеӯҗеҲҶзұ»дёӯзҡ„и§„еҲҷ
     * 
     * @return жүҖжңүи§„еҲҷеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<Rule> getAllRules() {
        List<Rule> allRules = new ArrayList<>();
        // ж·»еҠ еҪ“еүҚжЁЎеқ—зҡ„и§„еҲҷ
        List<Rule> rules = getRules();
        if (rules != null) {
            allRules.addAll(rules);
        }
        // йҖ’еҪ’ж”¶йӣҶжүҖжңүеӯҗеҲҶзұ»дёӯзҡ„и§„еҲҷ
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            allRules.addAll(partCategory.getAllRules());
        }
        return allRules;
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–жҢҮе®ҡи®Ўз®—йҳ¶ж®өзҡ„жүҖжңүи§„еҲҷеҲ—иЎЁпјҲеҢ…жӢ¬еӯҗеҲҶзұ»дёӯзҡ„и§„еҲҷпјү
     * йҖ’еҪ’ж”¶йӣҶжүҖжңүеӯҗеҲҶзұ»дёӯзҡ„и§„еҲҷ

     * @return жҢҮе®ҡи®Ўз®—йҳ¶ж®өзҡ„жүҖжңүи§„еҲҷеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<Rule> getAllRules(CalcStage calcStage) {
        if (calcStage == null) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        List<Rule> allRules = new ArrayList<>();
        // ж·»еҠ еҪ“еүҚжЁЎеқ—зҡ„и§„еҲҷ
        List<Rule> rules = getRules(calcStage);
        if (rules != null) {
            allRules.addAll(rules);
        }
        // йҖ’еҪ’ж”¶йӣҶжүҖжңүеӯҗеҲҶзұ»дёӯзҡ„и§„еҲҷ
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            allRules.addAll(partCategory.getAllRules(calcStage));
        }
        return allRules;
    }

        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();

        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {

        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // еҚ•зәҝзЁӢжҗңзҙўпјҢйҳІжӯўжңүйҮҚеӨҚи§Ј
        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {

    private ModuleAlgImpl initModuleCpModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
        // еҲӣе»әзәҰжқҹз®—жі•е®һдҫӢ
        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
        // ж №жҚ®loadTypeеҶіе®ҡжҳҜеҗҰдҪҝз”Ёе·®йҮҸеҠ иҪҪжЁЎеһӢ
        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
            // е·®йҮҸеҠ иҪҪжЁЎеһӢ
            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);

            // жҹҘиҜўеӯҗеӣҫ
            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));

            // жү“еҚ°relativePair.first,relativePair.second, жң¬ж¬ЎжҺЁзҗҶж¶үеҸҠеҲ°exeRulesе’ҢexeProgObjs
            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));

            // и°ғз”Ёж–°зҡ„initModelж–№жі•,issue:е·®йҮҸеҗҺз»ӯе®һзҺ°
            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
        } else {
            // е…ЁйҮҸеҠ иҪҪжЁЎеһӢ
            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
        }

        // // ж №жҚ®иҜ·жұӮеҲқе§ӢеҢ–зәҰжқҹжЁЎеһӢ
        // initModelByReq(req, alg);

        // ж·»еҠ жқҫејӣзӣ®ж ҮеҮҪж•°, ж–№дҫҝи°ғиҜ•
        alg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
        return alg;
    }

    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
        moduleInput.setRelaxSolve(req.isRelaxSolve());
        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
                startModule);
        FilterCloneResult filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
                partConstraintReqMap);
        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.partCategoryInputs());
        moduleInput.setPartCategoryErrorInfoMap(filterResult.errorInfoMap());
        return moduleInput;
    }
